underlying_goal: Debug and fix a Glance widget issue where adding tap targets or refreshing one widget causes all widgets to show the same content and tap target
friction_detail: The fix replaced collectAsState with a one-shot read, which fixed the bleed issue but broke widget reactivity when settings changed.
brief_summary: User needed to fix Glance widgets bleeding content/tap targets into each other; Claude identified root cause and applied a fix, but it introduced a new regression and the session hit context limits before a proper solution was implemented.
